title: non-derived entity
text: non-derived entity A component entity that is defined only in the component or modeled component and is not derived from a modeled entity. It is typically used to capture non-persistent data that may be needed during component processing. Synonyms: dummy entity, non-modeled entity Related Links Non-Derived Entity A non-derived entity is a Component Entity that is created using a template, not a Modeled Entity. It is used to define controls or data that are local to the component and that do not need to be shared with other objects. It is always a non-database entity. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
